mapper.insert:
insert into purchase_plan_entry_dep_apply (purchase_plan_entry_id, dep_purchase_apply_entry_id, dep_purchase_apply_id, purchase_bill_no, del_flag, tenant_id, create_by, create_time) values
(#{item.purchasePlanEntryId}, #{item.depPurchaseApplyEntryId}, #{item.depPurchaseApplyId}, #{item.purchaseBillNo}, '0', #{item.tenantId}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime})
mapper.update: update purchase_plan_entry_dep_apply r inner join dep_purchase_apply_entry e on r.dep_purchase_apply_entry_id = e.id inner join dep_purchase_apply a on e.parent_id = a.id set r.dep_purchase_apply_id = a.id, r.purchase_bill_no = a.purchase_bill_no where r.purchase_plan_entry_id = #{purchasePlanEntryId} and (r.del_flag = '0' or r.del_flag is null)

update purchase_plan_entry_dep_apply r inner join purchase_plan_entry e on r.purchase_plan_entry_id = e.id set r.del_flag = '1', r.delete_by = #{deleteBy}, r.delete_time = now(), r.update_time = now() where e.parent_id = #{planId} and (r.del_flag = '0' or r.del_flag is null)
mapper.select: select dpa.purchase_bill_no as applyBillNo, d.name as departmentName, e.qty as qty, coalesce(cu.nick_name, cu.user_name) as createByName, dpa.create_time as createTime, coalesce(au.nick_name, au.user_name) as auditByName, dpa.update_time as auditTime from purchase_plan_entry_dep_apply r inner join dep_purchase_apply_entry e on r.dep_purchase_apply_entry_id = e.id and (e.del_flag is null or e.del_flag != 1) inner join dep_purchase_apply dpa on e.parent_id = dpa.id and (dpa.del_flag = 0 or dpa.del_flag is null) left join fd_department d on dpa.department_id = d.id left join sys_user cu on dpa.create_by = cu.user_id left join sys_user au on dpa.update_by = au.user_id where r.purchase_plan_entry_id = #{entryId} and (r.del_flag = '0' or r.del_flag is null) order by dpa.purchase_bill_no, e.id

select distinct r.purchase_bill_no from purchase_plan_entry_dep_apply r inner join purchase_plan_entry e on r.purchase_plan_entry_id = e.id where e.parent_id = #{planId} and (r.del_flag = '0' or r.del_flag is null) and r.purchase_bill_no is not null and r.purchase_bill_no != '' order by r.purchase_bill_no

select r.purchase_plan_entry_id as entryId, r.purchase_bill_no as purchaseBillNo from purchase_plan_entry_dep_apply r inner join purchase_plan_entry e on r.purchase_plan_entry_id = e.id where e.parent_id = #{planId} and (r.del_flag = '0' or r.del_flag is null) and r.purchase_bill_no is not null order by r.purchase_plan_entry_id, r.purchase_bill_no
